headline: CVS Health Faces FTC Insulin Deal And Proxy Access Governance Test
summary: CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) has reached a proposed settlement with the Federal Trade Commission related to insulin pricing and its pharmacy benefit operations. The settlement is expected to reduce regulatory uncertainty around the pharmacy benefit management segment, a key part of CVS Health's business model. A shareholder proposal on proxy access is set to be voted on at the upcoming annual meeting, highlighting active investor interest in the company’s governance. For investors watching CVS...

headline: Baum Family Investments Announces Strong Q1 2026 Investment Activity and Expanding Pipeline
summary: Baum Family Investments (BFI) announces a strong start to 2026, highlighting robust first quarter investment activity across both acquisitions and dispositions, alongside a rapidly expanding pipeline.
